commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a visible-delivery typing policy for WhatsApp group auto-replies and threads a send-start typing callback through reply dispatch, ACP, durable outbound delivery, and the Plugin SDK hook context.

PR surface: Source +216, Tests +478, Generated 0. Total +694 across 34 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main starts WhatsApp composing via the reply lifecycle before the new visible-delivery boundary exists, and the PR adds focused regression tests for suppressed and deferred delivery paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should decide the public Plugin SDK hook contract and whether live WhatsApp proof is needed; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix: defer WhatsApp visible-reply typing until send start
target.body:
## Summary

WhatsApp group turns that are configured for automatic visible replies can defer the actual user-visible send until the channel delivery layer decides the payload is really going out. Before this change, the reply lifecycle could start typing as soon as the model run began. That meant an unmentioned WhatsApp group could briefly show a typing indicator even when the reply was still hidden, suppressed, routed through message-tool-only delivery, or later cancelled before any visible platform send.

This PR moves that typing start to the visible delivery boundary instead of the model-run boundary:

- adds a `visible_delivery` typing start policy and `onVisibleDeliveryStart` handoff through the reply options / hook context
- lets WhatsApp use that policy for unmentioned group replies that are configured for automatic visible replies
- threads the callback through routed replies, ACP reply dispatch, durable inbound delivery, and outbound send start
- keeps typing bounded so a stalled platform composing call cannot block message delivery
- updates the plugin SDK API baseline for the new hook/runtime surface

The important behavior is: typing starts only when a real visible send is about to happen, and only once. Silent/message-tool-only/background turns stay quiet.

## Commit Organization

- `fix: defer visible delivery typing until send start` contains the runtime/API wiring.
- `test: cover visible delivery typing handoff` contains the regression coverage across WhatsApp, reply dispatch, ACP, durable delivery, and outbound send start.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check`
- Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox: `tbx_01ktabcja4a83kgqe02vxj2gxv`, Actions run `26982920874`
  - `corepack pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts`
- Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox: `tbx_01ktab7y9ca4b0xhsvgys7h9x0`, Actions run `26982812823`
  - `corepack pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/before-deliver.test.ts`
- Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox: `tbx_01ktaazdtf3sr0gr9k1xz2hqs7`, Actions run `26982609326`
  - focused post-shrink tests for `before-deliver`, `dispatch-from-config`, WhatsApp inbound dispatch, and durable message send context
- Blacksmith Testbox via Crabbox: `tbx_01ktacw6haq14ez6ha25fezyrx`, Actions run `26984007449`
  - `corepack pnpm check:changed`
  - all static guards and typecheck lanes passed
  - failed only in unrelated `lint core` shard for pre-existing `src/tasks/task-flow-registry.store.test.ts` unused `root` parameters; this branch does not touch `src/tasks/**`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: WhatsApp group visible replies no longer start typing until the channel is about to send a visible reply.

Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest suites for WhatsApp inbound dispatch, reply dispatcher visible-delivery handoff, routed reply dispatch, ACP dispatch delivery, durable delivery, outbound send start, and plugin SDK API baseline check.

Evidence after fix: Testbox runs above passed for the touched behavior and SDK API baseline; broad `check:changed` typecheck lanes also passed.

Observed result after fix: visible-delivery typing starts at the delivery callback/send-start boundary and remains suppressed for silent or message-tool-only turns.

What was not tested: a live WhatsApp account/device E2E send was not run in this PR validation pass.
